overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit commercial district. The player moves from covered walkways past digital billboards and parked vehicles, through a security checkpoint, and into an open plaza with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway adjacent to circular commercial plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered sidewalk toward a large circular commercial building with neon signage

entered.detail: large cylindrical commercial building with curved facade and illuminated entrance
tall palm trees lining the street side
overhead concrete structure providing partial cover
cyan and yellow illuminated signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered sidewalk at night, with neon lights illuminating the path ahead. A large circular commercial building dominates the view in the distance, while palm trees line the left side of the walkway. The atmosphere is quiet with no visible pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with large digital advertising displays

events.description: turns right at the corner onto the street with digital billboards
crosses the street with yellow lane markings

agents.ego_description: turns right at the corner and crosses the street while passing large illuminated digital billboards

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying LIZZIES BAR advertisement with purple neon graphics
digital advertisement for MINDFUCK with stylized text and graphics
tall illuminated pillar with beverage advertisement featuring a face
yellow painted stripes on asphalt indicating pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the corner, leaving the covered walkway behind. Large digital billboards for LIZZIES BAR and MINDFUCK dominate the right side, glowing with purple and cyan neon light. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, moving through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with parked vehicles and building entrances

events.description: passes a bright green sports car parked on the street side

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past parked cars and illuminated building facades toward a security checkpoint

notable_agents.action: green sports car parked on the street side with sleek futuristic design

dark modern building with illuminated windows and glass panels
dark metal framework marking the entrance to a security checkpoint
trees with sparse foliage along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial street, the camera passes a vibrant green sports car parked on the side. Large digital screens display advertisements on the buildings ahead. The security checkpoint structure becomes visible in the distance as the camera approaches the entrance gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint corridor with glass barriers and fluorescent lighting

events.description: enters covered security checkpoint with green tinted glass walls
exits security checkpoint into open plaza area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walks through the security checkpoint corridor and emerges into an open plaza area

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking through the security checkpoint in the opposite direction

entered.detail: dark metal gate structure with vertical slats and integrated lighting
transparent glass panels with green SECURITY text and diagonal stripes
linear fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the corridor
palm trees visible through the exit of the checkpoint in the open plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow security checkpoint corridor with green-tinted glass walls marked with SECURITY signage. Fluorescent lights illuminate the enclosed space. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction. The camera then exits into a more open area with palm trees visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with crosswalk leading to futuristic commercial complex

events.description: crosses wide yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk in the plaza

agents.ego_description: crosses the wide plaza crosswalk and continues toward a large futuristic building complex with elevated walkways

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket walking ahead on the crosswalk in the same direction

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes spanning the plaza
large multi-level commercial building with glass facades and neon accents
overhead pedestrian bridge connecting building sections with illuminated edges
tall building with reflective glass exterior and horizontal neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the security checkpoint, the scene opens into a wide plaza with palm trees scattered throughout. The camera crosses a broad yellow-striped crosswalk, following another pedestrian toward an impressive futuristic building complex. Elevated walkways connect the structures overhead, while the night sky is visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a sheltered walkway into a wide, open futuristic plaza. It begins on a quiet covered sidewalk lined with palm trees, moving toward a distant circular building before turning right to leave the shelter behind. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped intersection, the environment opens up to reveal glowing purple and cyan billboards for Lizzies Bar and Mindfuck, passing a vibrant green sports car on the way toward a distant security gate. The scene then shifts into a narrow, fluorescent-lit corridor with green-tinted glass walls and security signage, momentarily enclosing the view as a pedestrian passes by. Finally, the camera emerges from the checkpoint into a sprawling plaza, crossing another broad crosswalk beneath elevated walkways and a dark night sky toward an impressive building complex.
